description_long: This is a stone obelisk set on a square pedestal, surrounded by a neatly maintained patch of green grass and low, bushy shrubs. The obelisk itself is tall and slender, with a rectangular cross-section and a smooth, slightly weathered surface. The front face of the obelisk features an inscription in uppercase letters, which appears to be engraved into the stone. The base is robust and slightly elevated, with a stepped design that transitions from the pedestal to the ground. The surrounding area is bordered by a square frame of grass, with the vegetation arranged symmetrically around the base. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative or memorial function, commonly found in parks or public squares.
description: A tall, slender stone obelisk with engraved text on its front, set on a square pedestal and surrounded by grass and low shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the engraved inscription and the symmetrical arrangement of shrubs around the base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain, unadorned surface of the obelisk and the square grassy border.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible inscription, highlighting the back of the pedestal and the vegetation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to the front but with the inscription less visible and the shrubs more prominent.
attribute_inscription: There is an engraved inscription in uppercase letters on the front face of the obelisk, located near the top. The text appears to be in Latin or a similar script, but is partially illegible from the image.
attribute_ornamentation: None visible; the obelisk is plain with no decorative carvings or motifs.
attribute_base_design: The base is a square stone pedestal with a stepped design, slightly raised above the surrounding ground and bordered by a square patch of grass and shrubs.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is flat and unadorned, with no visible decorative features.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a square border of grass and symmetrically arranged low shrubs, forming a neat, landscaped area.
